channel.title: Posts on Iris's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Iris's Blog

item.title: Blog Features Testing
item.description: In this post I’ll test several useful features of this blog. I’ll update it whenever I add other features. Math Typesetting Mathematical notation can be enabled by using KaTeX. For exapmle: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$ Note: Refer to Supported TeX Functions for more information. Emoji It is now possible to add emoji into posts. For example: 😄 Note: Refer to Emoji Cheat Sheet for more information.
